main.description: EXPERIMENTAL. A short text status posted to a private group feed. Schema mirrors app.bsky.feed.post conventions so records could later be published to a PDS unchanged.

text.description: The status text. Byte length is capped by maxLength; rendered length by maxGraphemes.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this post was originally created.

langs.description: Indicates languages used in the post text, as BCP-47 tags.
